justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted "after-tomorrow" as June 3rd and subsequent temporal requests.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent consistently offered alternatives when the requested slots were unavailable, and eventually found a suitable time.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent made several check_availability calls in each turn, which could be more efficient by checking a range of times at once.
justifications.customer_experience: The customer expressed frustration multiple times, indicating a less than smooth experience, although the agent did apologize.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent maintained context throughout the conversation and offered relevant alternatives, even after multiple rejections.
